requirement_topic.en: Chile 50 Hz Grid Settings and EMC Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 智利50 Hz电网设置及EMC证据
requirement_topic.zht: 智利50 Hz電網設定及EMC證據

summary.en: Chile is a 50 Hz market, so PV inverter firmware and nameplate ratings should support Chilean 50 Hz operation, local voltage classes, frequency protection thresholds, and project-specific grid-support settings. EMC evidence should also be prepared for the inverter family, usually through IEC / CISPR or equivalent test reports, because grid-connected power converters can affect radio-frequency disturbance, conducted emissions, immunity, and power quality even where the product authorization route does not state a single standalone EMC certificate.
summary.zh: 智利为50 Hz市场，因此光伏逆变器固件和铭牌额定值应支持智利50 Hz运行、当地电压等级、频率保护阈值及项目特定电网支撑设置。还应为逆变器系列准备EMC证据，通常通过IEC/CISPR或等效测试报告证明，因为并网功率变换器可能影响射频骚扰、传导发射、抗扰度和电能质量，即使产品授权路径未列明单独的EMC证书。
summary.zht: 智利為50 Hz市場，因此光伏逆變器韌體和銘牌額定值應支持智利50 Hz運行、當地電壓等級、頻率保護閾值及項目特定電網支撐設定。還應為逆變器系列準備EMC證據，通常透過IEC/CISPR或等效測試報告證明，因為併網功率變換器可能影響射頻騷擾、傳導發射、抗擾度和電能品質，即使產品授權路徑未列明單獨的EMC證書。

standards_or_laws: CNE technical norms for Chilean electric-sector operation

summary.en: China is also a 50 Hz market, so the base frequency is not the main gap. The gap is the configured protection envelope, local grid-code behavior, EMC report scope, and whether the exact Chile-shipped model has evidence for its intended voltage, installation environment, and firmware profile.
summary.zh: 中国同样为50 Hz市场，因此基准频率本身不是主要差距。差距在于已配置的保护包络、当地电网规范行为、EMC报告范围，以及出口智利的具体型号是否具备对应预期电压、安装环境和固件配置的证据。
summary.zht: 中國同樣為50 Hz市場，因此基準頻率本身不是主要差距。差距在於已配置的保護包絡、當地電網規範行為、EMC報告範圍，以及出口智利的具體型號是否具備對應預期電壓、安裝環境和韌體配置的證據。

gap.en: Do not treat 50 Hz compatibility as full grid compliance. A Chile-bound inverter should ship with a Chile profile or configurable settings validated for the relevant project, plus EMC and power-quality reports that identify the same hardware platform, enclosure, filters, firmware, and rated power family.
gap.zh: 不要将50 Hz兼容性视为完整并网合规。出口智利的逆变器应配有智利配置文件或经相关项目验证的可配置设置，并提供EMC和电能质量报告，报告中应识别相同硬件平台、外壳、滤波器、固件及额定功率系列。
gap.zht: 不要將50 Hz相容性視為完整併網合規。出口智利的逆變器應配有智利配置文件或經相關項目驗證的可配置設定，並提供EMC和電能品質報告，報告中應識別相同硬體平台、外殼、濾波器、韌體及額定功率系列。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of project grid compliance where frequency settings, protection, EMC, or power quality are reviewed; standalone EMC certificate status depends on product and project route
mandatory_status.cn: Partial; China 50 Hz operation aligns at base frequency, but Chinese reports do not establish Chile settings or project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China and Chile both use 50 Hz, but that only reduces one parameter gap. Chile-specific protection settings, EMC evidence, power-quality behavior, and project route acceptance still need separate review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国和智利均使用50 Hz，但这只减少了一个参数差距。智利特定保护设置、EMC证据、电能质量行为及项目路径接受情况仍需单独审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國和智利均使用50 Hz，但這只減少了一個參數差距。智利特定保護設定、EMC證據、電能品質行為及項目路徑接受情況仍需單獨審查。
